description_long: This is a modern two-story house surrounded by a low, dark boundary wall and featuring a spacious yard with landscaping elements such as trees, bushes, and a swing set. The house has a flat roof and a clean, geometric design with beige and white exterior walls, accented by large windows and a prominent glass-enclosed sunroom or patio area. There is an outdoor swimming pool adjacent to the house, as well as a driveway leading to a covered carport or garage. The property includes multiple staircases, both exterior and interior, providing access to the upper floor and rooftop. The main entrance is accessible via a set of steps and is highlighted by a sheltered overhang. The overall layout is open and airy, with ample outdoor living space and modern architectural features.
description: A modern, two-story house with flat roofs, large windows, a sunroom, pool, and landscaped yard enclosed by a low wall. The design features clean lines, outdoor amenities, and a spacious driveway.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the main entrance, sunroom, pool, and driveway with carport.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, swing set, and exterior staircase leading to the upper floor.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the pool, sunroom, and open patio area with landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the carport, driveway, and glass-enclosed sunroom.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass sunroom
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps, a sheltered overhang, and a modern door integrated into the facade
